title: Biomass Plant Technicians
description: Control and monitor biomass plant activities and perform maintenance as needed.

tasks.text: Operate biomass fuel-burning boiler or biomass fuel gasification system equipment in accordance with specifications or instructions.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform tests of water chemistry in boilers.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Operate high-pressure steam boiler or water chiller equipment for electrical cogeneration operations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate equipment to heat biomass, using knowledge of controls, combustion, and firing mechanisms.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate equipment to start, stop, or regulate biomass-fueled generators, generator units, boilers, engines, or auxiliary systems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Inspect biomass power plant or processing equipment, recording or reporting damage and mechanical problems.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Record or report operational data, such as readings on meters, instruments, and gauges.
tasks.rationale: Routine cognitive or manual task with high vulnerability to automation.

tasks.text: Operate valves, pumps, engines, or generators to control and adjust production of biofuels or biomass-fueled power.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Calculate, measure, load, or mix biomass feedstock for power generation.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Clean work areas to ensure compliance with safety regulations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Perform routine maintenance or make minor repairs to mechanical, electrical, or electronic equipment in biomass plants.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Measure and monitor raw biomass feedstock, including wood, waste, or refuse materials.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Calibrate liquid flow devices or meters, including fuel, chemical, and water meters.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.
Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Read and interpret instruction manuals or technical drawings related to biomass-fueled power or biofuels production equipment or processes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Operate heavy equipment, such as bulldozers and front-end loaders.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Preprocess feedstock to prepare for biochemical or thermochemical production processes.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Manage parts and supply inventories for biomass plants.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
